creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Complain upstream. Both of the following links still reference 75c3b8ca659b6b740ebea8db46d2ebccb5bac6c6

https://download.veloren.net/version/linux/x86_64/weekly
https://gitlab.com/veloren/veloren/-/tags/weekly

while server.veloren.net still lists "weekly" in

https://gitlab.com/veloren/serverbrowser/-/blob/master/server/servers.ron

Besides, I'll update the port tonight for the routine "weekly" refresh.
